author: Ben Currie
description: Dock a music player in the sidebar that streams your Navidrome (Subsonic) library at full quality without leaving your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ben Currie
manifest.description: Dock a music player in the sidebar that streams your Navidrome (Subsonic) library at full quality without leaving your vault.
manifest.name: Navidrome Player

name: Navidrome Player

releases.author: BenCurrie42
releases.description:
Compliance and code-quality fixes for the Obsidian community plugin review.

- Bump `minAppVersion` to 1.7.2 (`workspace.revealLeaf` is `@since 1.7.2`) and await it
- Replace all direct `.style.display` assignments with `hide()`/`show()`/`toggle()`
- Drop the plugin id/name from the command id and name
- Replace `builtin-modules` with Node's `module.builtinModules`
- Document why radio ICY metadata must use `fetch` rather than `requestUrl`

**Install:** copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/navidrome-player/`.

releases.author: BenCurrie42
releases.description:
Polish release: the tab bar now stays readable in a narrow sidebar.

### Added
- **Responsive tab bar** — when the sidebar is narrowed past 220px, the three tab buttons (Now Playing / Queue / Library) collapse into a single full-width native dropdown, and expand back into buttons when widened. Uses a `ResizeObserver` and Obsidian's built-in dropdown styling so it matches the theme in light and dark mode.

**Install:** copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/navidrome-player/`.
releases.name: 0.1.3 — Responsive sidebar tabs

releases.author: BenCurrie42
releases.description:
Feature release adding internet radio and library search (PRD-04, PRD-05).

## Added
- **Radio sub-tab** — a Radio subview under Library lists the internet radio stations saved on your server; selecting one streams it live (auto-advance/refill/prefetch disabled for live streams).
- **Live radio "now playing"** — best-effort track detection via ICY (SHOUTcast/Icecast) in-band metadata, falling back to the station name when unavailable.
- **Waveform cover style** — a new cover style alongside vinyl and square, selectable in settings.
- **Library search** — a search bar above the tab bar with a full-view results overlay across artists, albums, and songs (Subsonic `search3`).
- **Queue tab** — the up-next queue is now its own top-level tab.

## Changed
- Now Playing cover/waveform scale to fill the pane; removed the always-on scrollbar; radio drops the queue chrome.

## Install
Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/navidrome-player/`, then reload the plugin.

Full details in the [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/BenCurrie42/navidrome-player-for-obsidian/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
releases.name: v0.1.2 — Internet radio + library search
